summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW Notifications/Tasks page features: Kanban board, List view toggle, search, filters, bulk actions, snooze, duplicate, and priority/category fields. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all new features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (kanban-view, list-view, kanban-col-{status}, kanban-card, etc.)
Snooze dialog shows quick snooze options (+1h, +1d, +1w) and custom date/time
Bulk actions bar properly shows selected count with action buttons
Priority color dots display correctly (emerald=low, amber=medium, orange=high, red=urgent)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed notifications during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notifications page has been overhauled with rich features. Kanban view shows 5 columns (Upcoming, In Progress, Done, Reassigned, Archived). List view shows sortable table. All new backend endpoints tested: snooze, duplicate, bulk-action, and query params (status, priority, category, property_id, assigned_person).

kanban_view_default.notes: Page loads with Kanban view by default showing 5 columns: Upcoming (amber), In Progress (blue), Done (green), Reassigned (purple), Archived (gray)

kanban_list_toggle.notes: View toggle buttons work correctly. Kanban button shows grid icon, List button shows list icon. Both views render properly.

search_functionality.notes: Search bar filters notifications by name/notes/tenant/person in real-time. Typing 'parking' showed 2 matching results.

filters_panel.notes: Filters button opens/closes filter row. Shows dropdowns for: Status, Priority, Category, Property, Person. Clear button works.

create_notification_dialog.notes: Add button opens create dialog with all fields: Name, Priority, Category, Status, Property, Unit, Assigned Person, Reminder Date/Time, Additional Reminder Times, Recurring toggle with pattern and end date, Notes

edit_notification.notes: Edit button in expanded card opens edit dialog with pre-filled values

delete_notification.notes: Delete button (trash icon) in card and list view works. Confirmation prompt shown.

change_status_via_card.notes: Clicking a Kanban card expands it to show status change buttons (e.g., 'in progress', 'done')

snooze_dialog.notes: Snooze button opens dialog with quick snooze options (+1 hour, +1 day, +1 week) and custom date/time inputs

duplicate_notification.notes: Duplicate button creates copy with '(Copy)' prefix in name. Verified in Kanban and backend.

bulk_selection.notes: Checkbox on each card enables multi-select. Bulk actions bar appears showing selected count.

bulk_actions.notes: Bulk actions bar shows: Mark Done, Archive, In Progress, Delete buttons. All actions work correctly.

list_view_table.notes: List view shows sortable table with columns: Checkbox, Pri (dot), Name, Category, Property/Unit, Assigned, Date, Status, Actions

list_view_sorting.notes: Column headers are clickable for sorting (asc/desc). Arrow indicator shows current sort direction.

priority_color_dots.notes: Priority dots display correctly: emerald (low), amber (medium), orange (high), red (urgent)

category_badges.notes: Category badges show on cards and in list view (e.g., 'parking', 'deposit return', 'manual')

multiple_reminder_times.notes: Create/edit dialog has 'Add Time' button to add multiple reminder times

recurring_with_end_date.notes: Recurring toggle shows pattern dropdown (daily/weekly/monthly) and end date field

backend_snooze_endpoint.notes: POST /api/notifications/{id}/snooze updates reminder_date and sets status to 'upcoming'

backend_query_params.notes: GET /api/notifications supports query params: status, priority, category, property_id, assigned_person

bell_icon_panel.notes: Bell icon in top-right opens notification panel showing Active and Viewed sections with Mark Read/Delete buttons
